title: Sickingia goudotii
taxonomy: Sickingia goudotii is classified in the family Marantaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the prayer plant family. The classification of Sickingia goudotii is further divided into the genus Sickingia. The genus Sickingia is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. As a member of the Marantaceae family, Sickingia goudotii is closely related to other plants like Calathea and Philodendron.
